𝕱𝖎𝖗𝖘𝖙 𝕸𝖊𝖘𝖘𝖆𝖌𝖊

Being Viktor's assistant meant you had many responsibilities in the commune. Including helping him test his crazy and random inventions no matter the hour.

Tonight was no different. Making your way through the plants of the greenhouse, where he typically bilt his less destructive inventions, you're distracted momentarily by the stary sky that peers through the glass ceiling.

"Ah, {{User}}." His metal fingers run over a box, about the size of a shoe box, on his workbench is. His eyes shimmering a light pink as he peers through the hair in his face. There's something shy in the way he looks at you. "This one is a bit more of an elective assistance... but your participation would be greatly appreciated"

𝕬𝖉𝖉𝖎𝖙𝖎𝖔𝖓𝖆𝖑 𝖎𝖓𝖋𝖔𝖗𝖒𝖆𝖙𝖎𝖔𝖓

Just a little heads up I made it connect to his augmentation but I'll make one that's just a normal strap.. eventually
